arguments.content:
import { Restaurant, User } from './types';

export const mockUser: User = {
  id: '1',
  username: 'foodie_lover',
  email: 'foodie@example.com',
  phone: '+46 70 123 4567',
  language: 'en',
};

export const restaurantTypes = [
  'Italian',
  'Chinese',
  'Mexican',
  'Japanese',
  'Indian',
  'Thai',
  'American',
  'Mediterranean',
  'French',
  'Vietnamese',
];

export const dishes = [
  'Pizza',
  'Pasta',
  'Burger',
  'Sushi',
  'Tacos',
  'Curry',
  'Noodles',
  'Salad',
  'Steak',
  'Soup',
];

export const mockRestaurants: Restaurant[] = [
  {
    id: '1',
    name: 'Bella Italia',
    address: '123 Main Street',
    phone: '+46 70 111 2222',
    email: 'info@bellaitalia.se',
    type: 'Italian',
    averagePrice: 150,
    description: 'Authentic Italian cuisine with fresh ingredients imported directly from Italy. Our chefs have decades of experience creating traditional dishes.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Margherita Pizza', description: 'Classic tomato, mozzarella, and basil', price: 95 },
      { name: 'Spaghetti Carbonara', description: 'Creamy pasta with bacon and parmesan', price: 145 },
      { name: 'Tiramisu', description: 'Traditional Italian dessert', price: 75 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3293,
    longitude: 18.0686,
    website: 'https://bellaitalia.se',
    distance: 0.8,
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    name: 'Tokyo Garden',
    address: '45 Sushi Lane',
    phone: '+46 70 222 3333',
    email: 'contact@tokyogarden.se',
    type: 'Japanese',
    averagePrice: 220,
    description: 'Premium Japanese restaurant specializing in sushi and sashimi. Experience the art of Japanese cuisine in our serene garden setting.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579027989536-b7b1f875659b?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Salmon Sashimi', description: '8 pieces of fresh salmon', price: 180 },
      { name: 'Dragon Roll', description: 'Eel, cucumber, avocado topped with eel sauce', price: 165 },
      { name: 'Miso Soup', description: 'Traditional Japanese soup', price: 45 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3378,
    longitude: 18.0593,
    website: 'https://tokyogarden.se',
    distance: 1.2,
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    name: 'Taco Fiesta',
    address: '78 Spice Avenue',
    phone: '+46 70 333 4444',
    email: 'hola@tacofiesta.se',
    type: 'Mexican',
    averagePrice: 120,
    description: 'Vibrant Mexican cantina serving authentic street food. Our recipes have been passed down through generations.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551504734-5ee1c4a1479b?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Street Tacos', description: 'Three tacos with choice of meat', price: 95 },
      { name: 'Burrito Grande', description: 'Large burrito with rice, beans, and meat', price: 135 },
      { name: 'Guacamole', description: 'Fresh made tableside', price: 65 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3428,
    longitude: 18.0645,
    website: 'https://tacofiesta.se',
    distance: 0.5,
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    name: 'Golden Dragon',
    address: '99 Fortune Road',
    phone: '+46 70 444 5555',
    email: 'info@goldendragon.se',
    type: 'Chinese',
    averagePrice: 140,
    description: 'Traditional Cantonese and Szechuan cuisine. Our dim sum is legendary and our Peking duck is a must-try.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1526318896980-cf78c088247c?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Peking Duck', description: 'Whole duck with pancakes and hoisin', price: 380 },
      { name: 'Kung Pao Chicken', description: 'Spicy chicken with peanuts', price: 145 },
      { name: 'Dim Sum Platter', description: 'Assorted 12 pieces', price: 195 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3258,
    longitude: 18.0723,
    website: 'https://goldendragon.se',
    distance: 2.1,
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    name: 'Curry Palace',
    address: '22 Spice Street',
    phone: '+46 70 555 6666',
    email: 'namaste@currypalace.se',
    type: 'Indian',
    averagePrice: 165,
    description: 'Aromatic Indian cuisine featuring regional specialties. Our tandoor oven produces the most tender naan bread.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Butter Chicken', description: 'Creamy tomato curry', price: 175 },
      { name: 'Lamb Biryani', description: 'Fragrant rice with tender lamb', price: 195 },
      { name: 'Garlic Naan', description: 'Fresh baked flatbread', price: 45 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3489,
    longitude: 18.0512,
    website: 'https://currypalace.se',
    distance: 1.8,
  },
  {
    id: '6',

    address: '15 Rue de Food',
    phone: '+46 70 666 7777',
    email: 'bonjour@lepetitbistro.se',
    type: 'French',
    averagePrice: 280,
    description: 'Elegant French bistro offering classic dishes. Perfect for special occasions and romantic dinners.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550966871-3ed3cdb5ed0c?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Boeuf Bourguignon', description: 'Slow cooked beef in red wine', price: 295 },
      { name: 'French Onion Soup', description: 'Classic soup with gruyère', price: 125 },

    latitude: 59.3315,
    longitude: 18.0678,
    website: 'https://lepetitbistro.se',
    distance: 0.3,
  },
  {
    id: '7',
    name: 'Bangkok Express',
    address: '33 Pad Thai Road',
    phone: '+46 70 777 8888',
    email: 'sawadee@bangkokexpress.se',
    type: 'Thai',
    averagePrice: 135,
    description: 'Fast and flavorful Thai street food. Our green curries are famous throughout the city.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559314809-0d155014e29e?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Pad Thai', description: 'Stir-fried noodles with shrimp', price: 145 },
      { name: 'Green Curry', description: 'Coconut curry with chicken', price: 155 },
      { name: 'Mango Sticky Rice', description: 'Sweet dessert with fresh mango', price: 85 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3398,
    longitude: 18.0556,
    website: 'https://bangkokexpress.se',
    distance: 1.5,
  },
  {
    id: '8',
    name: 'The Burger Joint',
    address: '66 Grill Street',
    phone: '+46 70 888 9999',
    email: 'yummy@burgerjoint.se',
    type: 'American',
    averagePrice: 110,
    description: 'Gourmet burgers made with locally sourced beef. Our patties are hand-formed daily.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1466978913421-dad2ebd01d17?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Classic Cheeseburger', description: 'Beef patty with cheddar, lettuce, tomato', price: 115 },
      { name: 'Bacon BBQ Burger', description: 'With crispy bacon and BBQ sauce', price: 145 },
      { name: 'Sweet Potato Fries', description: 'Crispy fries with aioli', price: 55 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3445,
    longitude: 18.0623,
    website: 'https://burgerjoint.se',
    distance: 0.9,
  },
  {
    id: '9',
    name: 'Mediterranean Oasis',
    address: '88 Olive Way',
    phone: '+46 70 999 0000',
    email: 'ola@mediterraneanoasis.se',
    type: 'Mediterranean',
    averagePrice: 155,
    description: 'Fresh Mediterranean flavors featuring Greek and Turkish cuisine. Our hummus is made from scratch.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544025162-d76694265947?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Mixed Grill Platter', description: 'Lamb, chicken, and kofta', price: 245 },
      { name: 'Falafel Wrap', description: 'Crispy falafel with tahini', price: 95 },
      { name: 'Greek Salad', description: 'Feta, olives, and fresh vegetables', price: 85 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3289,
    longitude: 18.0712,
    website: 'https://mediterraneanoasis.se',
    distance: 1.1,
  },
  {
    id: '10',
    name: 'Pho Vietnam',
    address: '11 Noodle Street',
    phone: '+46 70 101 2020',
    email: 'xinchao@phovietnam.se',
    type: 'Vietnamese',
    averagePrice: 125,
    description: 'Authentic Vietnamese cuisine with a focus on fresh herbs and delicate flavors. Our pho broth simmers for 24 hours.',
    picture: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582878826629-29b7ad1cdc43?w=400',
    menu: [
      { name: 'Beef Pho', description: 'Rice noodles in aromatic beef broth', price: 115 },
      { name: 'Banh Mi', description: 'Vietnamese sandwich with pickled vegetables', price: 85 },
      { name: 'Fresh Spring Rolls', description: 'Shrimp and vegetables', price: 75 },
    ],
    latitude: 59.3412,
    longitude: 18.0589,
    website: 'https://phovietnam.se',
    distance: 0.7,
  },
];
